description: Raoul Pal discusses macroeconomic trends, focusing on the impact of inflation and interest rates on demand destruction. He emphasizes the importance of understanding secular trends and the business cycle in investment strategies.
topic_summary: In this episode, Raoul Pal shares insights on the current economic landscape, highlighting the obsession with inflation and central bank policies. He explains how recent changes in interest rates and financial conditions have led to significant demand destruction across various markets [t=219.93].
